content.rendered:
Bring a modern update to conventional order management

Modernize your restaurant with the efficient restaurant management system of Foaps and never miss an order again.

Get Started Free
Get a Demo

• No CC required • Free for 30 days  • No feature limit

Previous
Next
Product Video

See Foaps in action

How it works

How Foaps helps you run your restaurant better

Order Management

Manage online food orders, all from a single point

Stop toggling between different dashboards to manage food orders. Avoid confusions and leverage Foaps to handle your orders from multiple online delivery partners effortlessly on a single, consolidated dashboard.

Menu Management

Bring updates across delivery platforms instantly

Automate your menu and pricing updates via Foaps and eliminate the need to update on each delivery platform manually. Revise your pricing, modify the menu and confirm the availability of items by just updating on Foaps alone. The changes will be then reflected across all food delivery platforms in no time.

Usabaility

Collaborate smoothly with multiple delivery partners

Run a well-managed food order delivery process by handling multiple delivery partners. Avoid delays and errors by staying on top of online orders and tracking their progress through a single dashboard. Complete the order quickly and help delivery partners reach customers on time.

Actionable Insights

Draw decisive conclusions from actionable insights

Facilitate the overall growth of your restaurant business by analyzing the insightful reports prepared by Foaps based on the orders and your activity. Make productive decisions based on the insights and bring necessary alterations to your business.

Receive orders from your food delivery apps

Connect Foaps with the food delivery apps you use at your restaurants.

Features

Features that are innovative, powerful and most wanted for your restaurant!

Order Management

Leverage Foaps’ centralized order management system to handle numerous online food orders from multiple food delivery partners from a consolidated dashboard without any hassles. Thereby, respond quickly to orders and fulfill them on time.

Read More

Menu Management

Automate your menu and pricing updates via Foaps and eliminate the need to update on each delivery platform manually. Revise your pricing, modify the menu and confirm the availability of items by just updating on Foaps alone. The changes will be then reflected across all food delivery platforms in no time.

Read More

In-depth reports

Identify the best performing fields, the areas that need attention, the potential areas of improvement and find productive insights to grow your business via our comprehensive, in-depth reports generated on the basis of your past order data.

Read More

Loved and believed by people beyond boundaries!

We 're really happy and satisfied with Foaps. They have helped us ease our operations of online delivery by getting us to deal with all our online platforms on a single platform with utmost ease of operations.
Geethu, Haji Ali
Now, instead of switching between different apps, we are easily managing online orders from one place using Foaps. Our staffs who are not very learned are able to easily manage online orders, they say Foaps is very simple and easy to use
Sathar, Mallus Dhaba
Foaps saves our time and makes work easier, another thing is that it is very easy to use . And of course we 're really happy with their support team, they always find prompt solutions to all our concerns ❤️
Razeen, Ceylone Bake House
Previous
Next

Who can use FOAPS?

Facing challenges managing your food orders? Foaps has got you covered. Be it large-scale or small-scale; restaurants, cafes, bakeries or cloud kitchens, Foaps helps you manage orders single-handedly and power up your culinary business with modern technology.

Restaurants
Bakery
Cafe
Cloud Kitchen
Food Truck
Previous
Next

Bring an innovative twist to online food order management with Foaps!

Try it risk free — Full access. No credit card required.

Get Started Free
